content:
Fixed 3 review gaps in vendor statement reconciliation:
1. Migration 068: tenant_id changed from nullable to NOT NULL on both vendor_statements and vendor_statement_lines. vendor_statement_lines got new tenant_id index. Table now uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS instead of ALTER TABLE since base table didn't exist.
2. get_lines() in vendor_statement_repo.rs now requires tenant_id parameter and filters by tenant in SQL query. All 4 callers in vendor_statements.rs route handler updated.
3. update_line() now validates invoice ownership via validate_invoice_ownership() (checks invoice belongs to same tenant+vendor), fetches the line to get amount_cents, and computes actual variance (line.amount_cents - invoice_amount) instead of always storing 0.
Also changed StatementLineItem.tenant_id from Option<TenantId> to TenantId in domain model, LineRow in repo, and frontend api.ts.
summary: Fixed vendor statement review gaps: nullable tenant_id, missing tenant filter in get_lines(), zero variance in manual matches
